arts.ttl: Man Utd plot STUNNING Rashford swap transfer for Bayern Munich wonderkid
arts.sum: Rashford is currently on loan at Aston Villa, who have a buy option of more than €40 million on the 27-year-old, and has impressed in his first two appearances for the club, seemingly encouraging United of a market to sell him if he returns to Old Trafford in the summer. Manchester United are reportedly exploring an ambitious transfer that would see Marcus Rashford move to Bayern Munich this summer in exchange for one of the German side’s brightest wonderkids.

arts.ttl: Jack Draper through to Qatar Open semi-finals after beating Matteo Berrettini as Carlos Alcaraz is knocked out
arts.sum: Jack Draper is through to the semi-finals of the Qatar Open after a comeback 4-6 6-4 6-3 victory against Italy's Matteo Berrettini, on the same day top seed Carlos Alcaraz was knocked out. Berrettini, who defeated Novak Djokovic earlier in the tournament, confidently claimed the opening set against Draper in Doha, but failed to get the job done in the second.

arts.ttl: Midfielder admits he would have preferred Manchester United over Tottenham in Europa League draw
arts.sum: AZ Alkmaar captain Jordy Clasie has shared his delight at drawing Tottenham in the Europa League, even if he’d have prepared Manchester United. Voetbal Primeur cover comments from the Ziggo Sport following the Europa League draw on Friday. arts.ttl: Journalist explains why Manchester United’s ‘daring’ style could end up benefitting Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Real Sociedad could benefit from Manchester United’s ‘daring’ style under Ruben Amorim when the two sides meet in the Europa League. That’s according to journalist Miguel Ángel Moyá, via El Desmarque, who believes the Spanish side have good prospects against a team who are becoming regular opponents in Europe.
